summary: Critical gaps: (1) No actual unit tests exist—the workflow invokes `pytest tests/` but `tests/` directory is absent. (2) `run_act_tests.py` references `tests/fixtures/case_*/expected.json` fixtures that don't exist; harness cannot run. (3) Action refs (checkout@v4, setup-python@v5) must be pinned to 40-char commit SHAs with version comments per best practices—currently unpinned. (4) Task requires TDD (red-green-refactor) and mocks; zero tests provided. License checker script itself is well-designed (good OOP, DI, error handling, type hints) but incomplete deliverable fails execution requirements.
